title: Growth strategy — widgets, exports, i18n, browse pages, internal linking
features: Changelog widget — embeddable patch notes viewer at /widget/spire-codex-changelog.js with version switching and color-coded badges
Developer showcase page at /showcase — community project gallery for tools built with the API
Data export archives — downloadable ZIP files of all game data per language via /api/exports/{lang}
Card browse matrix — 41 programmatic SEO pages at /cards/browse/ for filter combinations (rare-attacks, ironclad-skills, etc.)
Entity version history — collapsible timeline on card, relic, potion, monster, and power detail pages
Internal linking mesh — powers on cards link to power pages, encounter monsters link to monster pages, power pages show cards that apply them
International SEO — localized landing pages for 13 non-English languages with hreflang alternates and 39 new sitemap entries
SoftwareApplication JSON-LD schema on the /developers page
fixes: Standardized all SEO page titles to consistent format across all 23 pages
Removed unnecessary horizontal rule above card detail toggle buttons
api_changes: New endpoint: GET /api/exports/{lang} — download all game data as a ZIP archive
New endpoint: GET /api/history/{entity_type}/{entity_id} — entity version history and per-field diffs
Changelog widget documentation added to /developers page
